scripts.dev: concurrently "npm start" "cross-env PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 PYTHONUTF8=1 && cd ../python && source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || call ./.venv/Scripts/activate && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload"
scripts.prod: concurrently "npm run frontend" "cross-env PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 PYTHONUTF8=1 && cd ../python && source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || call ./.venv/Scripts/activate && python -m uvicorn main:app"
